hearts.title: Your three hearts
hearts.body: Each day below 50% completion costs one heart. Three consecutive days at 50% or more earns one back. Lose all three and the app nudges you to restart smaller.

ring.title: Today's progress
ring.body: This ring fills as you log habits. It includes any shared habits from your workspaces too — your own completions count, your partners' don't.

checklist.title: Tap to log a habit
checklist.body: One tap on a habit's circle marks it done. The list resets each morning. Tap the row itself for more options + the compound effect of that habit.

workspaces.title: Track together
workspaces.body: Habits you keep with a partner, family or small group land here. Each member logs their own tap; you can see who's done what today.

futureSelf.title: Your future self
futureSelf.body: Tap here for the person you're becoming — vision, streak fire, and the compound effects of every habit over a year and a decade.
